nodes.text: "A town in the small wood. Up the coast. The kind of place that hasn't been written about because the people in it have been busy not writing about it."
"There's a tower on a hill there. Not the one you're thinking of. There is one in every story I have walked through and they are not the same tower, except where they are."
"End of the line, by the way, is a relative concept. You can take a Shillelagh from any line."
